title: Transactional lane sequence
statement: Implementations shall execute the seam transaction lane as `prepare -> open_session/capability_view -> execute -> commit` with deterministic phase outcomes.

title: Stable identity contract
statement: Formula, name, and spill-range identities shall use stable typed IDs (`formula_stable_id`, `FecNameId`, `FecRangeId`) in commit payloads and traces.

title: Commit delta split
statement: Accepted commits shall emit split deltas (`value_delta`, `shape_delta`, `topology_delta`) with no ambiguity across value/shape/topology concerns.
notes: Required for scheduler and replay tooling.

title: Spill event typing
statement: Spill transitions shall be explicit typed events (`SpillTakeover`,`SpillClearance`,`SpillBlocked`) within `shape_delta`.

title: Snapshot fence enforcement
statement: Commit shall reject transactions where tx/session/coordinator snapshot fences do not match.
notes: Coordinator-global fence hardening remains a tracked gap.

title: Session-bound capability authority
statement: Capability decisions shall be session-bound and commit-validated; capability denial outcomes shall be deterministic.

title: Typed reject outcomes
statement: Reject outcomes shall be machine-typed and replay-stable via commit status + reject detail payload.
notes: Taxonomy expansion is tracked before wider adoption.

title: Name-id incremental routing
statement: Runtime name-id dependency deltas shall be eligible for incremental routing; seam must not force full recalc for name-only edits.
notes: Policy ownership remains in coordinator layer.

title: Policy boundary
statement: FEC shall emit evidence and deltas only; recalc/full-fallback policy remains core-engine owned.

title: Trace schema versioning
statement: When tracing is enabled, events shall carry `trace_version=fec-f3e-trace/current` and schema field validation status.
notes: Trace schema is part of conformance surface.

title: Spill-event perf counters
statement: Seam perf counters shall expose spill-takeover/clearance/blocked event counts for policy-economics analysis.
notes: Required for incremental vs fallback evidence.

title: Scenario coverage
statement: Seam scenario suite shall include blocked-spill recovery/re-block and observer update behavior.

title: Coordinator contention replay
statement: Deterministic contention replay for interleaved commits is required before multi-thread seam promotion.
notes: Tracked open gap from current observations.

title: Concurrency hardening
statement: Thread-safe coordinator/session storage and deterministic conflict handling are required before async/MVCC seam claims.
notes: Tracked open gap from current observations/reviews.
